sprint.goal: Fix governance startup in worktrees (#1118 via --no-sqlite flag), land educate mode fix (PR #1104), begin false-positive matcher scope narrowing (#1119)

senior.title: P0: Add --no-sqlite flag to agentguard guard for fail-open in worktrees without SQLite bindings (#1118)
senior.note: P0: governance runtime cannot start in scheduler-spawned worktrees due to missing better-sqlite3 bindings (Node v22.22.1 / ABI v127). Recommended fix: add --no-sqlite flag to agentguard guard that bypasses SQLite storage and runs governance in-memory only. This enables self-governance for worktree agents. See issue #1118 for full context and suggested approaches.

blockers.description: agentguard guard fails with SQLite bindings error in scheduler-spawned worktrees — governance runtime cannot start. All worktree agents unable to self-govern.

prs.title: fix(claude-init): write hooks with full binary path (closes #964)
prs.note: Merged successfully. All CI checks passed.

prs.title: fix(adapters): educate mode always allows regardless of suggestion presence (closes #1026)
prs.note: Rebased on main. Format:fix applied to 5 src files. Awaiting new CI run — should be green. Previously failing: old base (Prettier violations + pre-existing go-fast-path failures).

openPrNotes: PR #1104 adapter tests: 248 passing locally. CLI tests: 818 passing locally. CI run pending.
